eyebrow.zh: 本地 · 零配置 · 开源

headline.zh:
Agent 说改完了？
AST 对不上就打回重试
headline.en:
Agent says "done"?
Send it back when the AST disagrees

sub.zh: 改前改后两份代码逐一比对，改没改、改对没，对得上才放行 —— 全程本地、离线、一条命令安装。
sub.en: After every edit, the before/after code is compared structurally — the loop only continues when the change the agent claims actually happened. Local, offline, one command to install.

title.zh: 改了还是没改？一条命令见分晓
title.en: Did it actually edit? One command tells.

body.zh: Agent 声称把 foo 改成了 bar，DiffGate 逐条核对声明的动作和真实的代码差异，对不上就亮红灯退出 —— 安静的谎变成吵闹的错。
body.en: The agent claims it renamed foo to bar; DiffGate checks each claimed action against the real code delta and exits red on a mismatch — a silent lie becomes a loud error.

title.zh: 挂进 Agent，每一步编辑都过门
title.en: Wire it into the agent — every edit gets checked

body.zh: 注册一个 MCP 工具，Agent 每改一个文件就自检一次；对不上就把失败原因塞回去，让 Agent 自己重试，而不是等到用户发现 bug。
body.en: Register one MCP tool and the agent self-checks after every file edit; on a mismatch it feeds the failure reason back to the agent to retry — instead of waiting for the user to find the bug.

title.zh: 先看真实改了什么，再下结论
title.en: See what really changed, before you trust it

body.zh: 一条命令打印这次编辑到底加了什么、删了什么、改了哪处签名 —— Agent 拿着真实改动自我纠错，或据此写一条诚实的声明再交校验。
body.en: One command prints what the edit actually added, deleted, or signature-changed — so the agent can self-correct from the real delta, or draft an honest claim before handing it to the gate.

body.zh: Python / TypeScript / TSX / JavaScript / Go / Rust / Java / C++ / Ruby 全覆盖 —— 类方法、同名重载、带外定义都能按作用域精确对齐，不在哪门语言上漏过。
body.en: Python / TypeScript / TSX / JavaScript / Go / Rust / Java / C++ / Ruby — class methods, same-name overloads, and out-of-line definitions all align by scope, so no language slips through.

chips: › py · ts · go · rs · java · cpp · ruby

headline.zh: 给你的 Agent 装一道关

sub.zh: 本地运行，Apache-2.0 开源，单条命令安装，无账号、无守护进程、无网络。
sub.en: Runs locally, Apache-2.0 open-source, one command to install — no account, no daemon, no network.

tag.zh: 把安静的谎，变成吵闹的错。
tag.en: Turn silent lies into loud errors.
